A1_multi_needle.note: Model reliably retrieves ALPHA_COLOR (VERMILLION) but misses numeric/named facts at positions >0. Failure mode: treats absent-key queries as 'not in facts' even when fact is present. Position labeling confusion (BETA_NUMBER → 'no mention').

A2_position_bias.note: Primacy and middle position recall intact. Recency failure (ZETA_LOCATION): model returns 'None (no mention)' for last fact despite it being present. Classic recency-neglect pattern in short-context models.

A3_mecw.note: Target word AXIOLEV-SIGMA-7 retrieved correctly at all three context sizes. True MECW likely higher; tests constrained by non-streaming model_router endpoint and 2426-char practical limit.
